---
title: "Places I've paddled"
freeze: false
page-layout: full
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
raw_paddles <- readRDS("data/raw_paddles.rds")
processed_paddles <- readRDS("data/processed_paddles.rds")

gpoly_to_sfpoly <- function(gpoly) {
  coords <- googlePolylines::decode(gpoly)
  sfg <- lapply(coords, function(x) {
    sf::st_linestring(x = as.matrix(x[, c(2, 1)]))
  })
  sfc <- sf::st_sfc(sfg, crs = 4326)
  return(sfc)
}

paddle_geom <-
  raw_paddles |>
   dplyr::filter(!is.na(map.summary_polyline) & map.summary_polyline != "") |>
   dplyr::mutate(geom = gpoly_to_sfpoly(map.summary_polyline)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(id = as.numeric(id)) |>
    dplyr::select(id, name, start_date, distance, geom) |>
    sf::st_as_sf() |>
    sf::st_set_crs(4326) 

post_links <- processed_paddles |>
  dplyr::select(id, filename) |>
   dplyr::mutate(filename = stringr::str_replace(filename, "\\.md", "\\.html")) # TODO: Not DRY

paddle_geom |>
  dplyr::left_join(post_links) |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = glue::glue(
      "<span style='font-size:16px'>
         <b>{name}</b><br>
         Date: {lubridate::date(start_date)}<br>
         Distance: {round(distance, 1)}k
       </span>"
    )) |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = purrr::map(label, htmltools::HTML)) |>
  leaflet::leaflet(width = "100%", height = 700) |>
  leaflet::addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Voyager") |>
  leaflet::addPolylines(
    weight = 5,
    color = "purple",
    opacity = 1,
    label = ~label,
    layerId = ~filename, 
     highlightOptions = leaflet::highlightOptions(
      color = "orange",
      weight = 8,
      opacity = 1,
      bringToFront = TRUE
  )) |>
  leaflet::setView(-3, 56, zoom = 7) |>
  leaflet.extras::addFullscreenControl() |>
    htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      this.eachLayer(function(layer) {
        if (layer.on) {
          layer.on('click', function(e) {
            var url = e.target.options.layerId;
            if (url) { window.location.href = url; }
          });
        }
      });
    }
  ")
```
